CreateSnic.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string up to 64 characters, see [ClientToken Idempotency](#idempotency)
CreateSnic.name: Name of the service NIC; supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, special characters -_/., and Chinese characters; must start with a letter; length 1-65
CreateSnic.ipAddress: Specified IP address for the service NIC; auto-assigned if not provided
CreateSnic.bandwidth: Specified bandwidth for the service NIC
CreateSnic.billing.paymentTiming: Payment timing: Prepaid or Postpaid; required when creating an order, not required for renewal
CreateSnic.billing.reservation: Reservation info; not required for Postpaid, required for Prepaid
CreateSnic.tags.tagKey: Tag key; supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /.; length 1-65
CreateSnic.tags.tagValue: Tag value; supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /.; length 0-65
